map.name: Tower of Convergence Crystal Altar Chamber

area.name: Faction Lands
area.description: Territories controlled by the various factions of the world.

area.name: Festival Grounds
area.description: Magical festival grounds that transform with the seasons.

area.name: Event Zones
area.description: Special areas for seasonal and world events.

area.name: The Nine Towers
area.description: Nine mage towers, each holding a colored crystal.

area.name: Tower of Convergence
area.description: The tenth tower — where the nine crystals may be united.
